text:
was a Kashmiri an. Al-BTriini too specifically states this fact.1
Vamnabhalta commentator of the Khandakhddyaka confirms the above
statement. Utpala lived in the middle of the 10th century A.D. For,
he states in his commentary on the Br. Jataka that he wrote his
Vivrti in 5aka year 888 (966 A.D.). It was a Thursday coinciding
with the 5th lunar day of the bright fortnight of the lunar month
Caitra. The Brhat Samhitd was commented upon by him towards
the end of the same lunar year i.e. on a Thursday, Phalguna Krsna
Dvttiya.
He has also commented upon the following works : Togaydtrd,
Brhajjdtaka, Brhanmdnasa) a Karana grantha according to ANBirun!
I. 157), Laghujdtaka, Brhat Samhitd, Khandakhadya, SatpahcdHkd (of
PrthuyaSas).
His original works : He appears to have written many an
original work, some of which are the following : (1) Prafnajndna in
70 Arya verses on horary astrology.2 (2) He seems to have written a
work en tit! ed Bha ffo tpala-hord-Sdstram in 75 verses.
